overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game. The player character, equipped with weapons and backpack, traverses a rural Oregon landscape—wading through a shallow river near a collapsed concrete bridge before walking along an abandoned paved road through a deserted settlement surrounded by forested mountains. The environment shows signs of decay with derelict vehicles and overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with collapsed concrete bridge

events.description: character steps from dirt bank into shallow river water
character exits water onto dry dirt embankment

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water toward a collapsed concrete bridge structure, weapons visible on back

entered.detail: destroyed concrete bridge with broken support pillars partially submerged in water
two-story white rectangular building with dark windows
large boulders and rocky outcrop along riverbank
shallow clear water with visible rocky riverbed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a post-apocalyptic riverside scene. The character wades through shallow water toward a collapsed concrete bridge with twisted rebar and broken pillars. A white abandoned building sits on the left bank among large boulders, while forested mountains rise in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt embankment leading to paved road intersection

events.description: approaching paved road intersection, green street sign becomes visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking up dirt path toward paved road intersection, transitioning from riverside to road

entered.detail: green road sign with white text mounted on metal pole
cracked asphalt road with double yellow lines and overgrown edges
derelict wooden building with covered porch and dark signage

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the river behind and ascends a dirt embankment toward a paved road. A green street sign reading 'McKenzie River Rd' becomes visible overhead. The collapsed bridge and water recede from view as an abandoned gas station comes into view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned rural highway through forested mountain pass

events.description: character steps from dirt onto paved asphalt road surface
road curves right passing rocky cliff face and wooden fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along abandoned paved road past derelict buildings and vehicles, heading toward forested mountains

entered.detail: abandoned blue sedan with rust and broken windows
white rectangular speed limit sign with black text
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation
weathered wooden post fence along road edge
orange construction-style warning sign with black text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the cracked asphalt of an abandoned highway, passing a derelict gas station and rusted vehicles. The road winds through a mountainous landscape with rocky cliffs rising on the right and dense pine forests ahead. Road signs including a 35 mph speed limit and warning signs appear along the route as the environment becomes more rugged and forested.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate riverside ruin into a rugged, forested mountain highway. It begins with the character wading through shallow water toward a collapsed concrete bridge and a white abandoned building nestled among boulders. As the character leaves the river behind, the camera ascends a dirt embankment toward a paved road, passing under a green McKenzie River Rd sign while the water recedes. The scene then shifts to a stretch of cracked asphalt, moving past a derelict gas station and rusted vehicles as the terrain becomes more mountainous. Finally, the camera follows the winding highway past speed limit signs and rocky cliffs, heading deeper into a dense pine forest.
